title: Minecraft Adventure
description: Get ready for adventure, many epics await you!
body:
![Minecraft Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78068e939ef0e8dd8934b895bf25dd59a4c16a70.png)

Take off on an unforgettable adventure with a vanilla experience !

**!!Warning!!**
This modpack is still under development. Some updates may overwrite your settings, please check the changelog before updating the modpack.

## Who is this modpack for?

This modpack is designed to completely revamp the vanilla Minecraft experience. No more long hours in the mines to find diamonds. Now it's time for adventure! You'll be able to find what you need in the many dungeons and abandoned buildings (or not...).

## Features
### Character progression

**Skills:** have you always dreamed of dropping meteorites or crushing your enemies? A wide range of skills will allow you to completely change your gameplay.

**Specialization:** from mage to warrior, necromancer to templar, you'll have to choose your own path.

**Equipment:** many new armors, weapons and enchantments with new possible combinations.

### Mobs and environment

**Bosses:** new bosses await!

**Elite monster:** get ready to face new monsters with special abilities!

**Difficulty:** vanilla monsters now have new skills, so they'll be tougher to face.

**Food:** food can now give you real buffs useful in combat.

### Exploration

**Structures:** Get ready to discover new and even more challenging dungeons.

## Optimization

Many optimization mods are integrated, so you can run this modpack even on small configurations!
